name: All capabilities
description: Analyze data and build machine learning and generative AI models and applications powered by Amazon Bedrock, Amazon EMR, AWS Glue, Amazon Athena, Amazon SageMaker AI and Amazon SageMaker Lakehouse

environmentConfigurations.name: Lakehouse Database
environmentConfigurations.description: Creates databases in Amazon SageMaker Lakehouse for storing tables in S3 and Amazon Athena resources for your SQL workloads

environmentConfigurations.name: RedshiftServerless
environmentConfigurations.description: Creates an Amazon Redshift Serverless workgroup for your SQL workloads

environmentConfigurations.name: OnDemand Workflows
environmentConfigurations.description: Enables you to create Airflow workflows to be executed on MWAA environments

environmentConfigurations.name: OnDemand MLExperiments
environmentConfigurations.description: Enables you to create Amazon Sagemaker mlflow in the project

environmentConfigurations.name: OnDemand EMR on EC2 Memory-Optimized
environmentConfigurations.description: Enables you to create an additional memory optimized Amazon EMR on Amazon EC2

parameterOverrides.name: connectionDescription
parameterOverrides.value: Spark connection for EMR EC2 cluster

resolvedParameters.name: connectionDescription
resolvedParameters.value: Spark connection for EMR EC2 cluster

environmentConfigurations.name: OnDemand EMR on EC2 General-Purpose
environmentConfigurations.description: Enables you to create an additional general purpose Amazon EMR on Amazon EC2

parameterOverrides.name: connectionDescription

environmentConfigurations.name: OnDemand RedshiftServerless
environmentConfigurations.description: Enables you to create an additional Amazon Redshift Serverless workgroup for your SQL workloads

environmentConfigurations.name: OnDemand Catalog for Redshift Managed Storage
environmentConfigurations.description: Enables you to create additional catalogs in Amazon SageMaker Lakehouse for storing data in Redshift Managed Storage

environmentConfigurations.name: OnDemand EMRServerless
environmentConfigurations.description: Enables you to create an additional Amazon EMR Serverless application for running Spark workloads

environmentConfigurations.name: Amazon Bedrock Chat Agent
environmentConfigurations.description: A configurable generative AI app with a conversational interface

environmentConfigurations.name: Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Base
environmentConfigurations.description: A reusable component for providing your own data to apps

environmentConfigurations.name: Amazon Bedrock Guardrail
environmentConfigurations.description: A reusable component for implementing safeguards on model outputs

environmentConfigurations.name: Amazon Bedrock Function
environmentConfigurations.description: A reusable component for including dynamic information in model outputs

environmentConfigurations.name: Amazon Bedrock Prompt
environmentConfigurations.description: A reusable set of inputs that guide model outputs

environmentConfigurations.name: Amazon Bedrock Evaluation
environmentConfigurations.description: Enables evaluation features to compare Bedrock models

environmentConfigurations.name: QuickSight
environmentConfigurations.description: Amazon QuickSight for data visualization and business intelligence
